title: matthiola odoratissima var. tanaicensis
intro: Matthiola odoratissima var. tanaicensis is a variety of the Matthiola odoratissima plant, commonly known as the stock or gillyflower. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. It is believed to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and reducing fever, as well as acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for its medicinal use.
